---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or significant improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature in one or two sentences.

## Motivation or Use Case

What problem does this solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed Change

Describe the API, CLI, workflow, or behavior you want.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Documentation or Example Impact

What docs, examples, or migration notes would need to change?

## Additional Context

Anything else maintainers should know before discussing implementation.
